name: Better-Than-Sex Cake #2 (Corrected)
recipeIngredient: 1 small can Mandarin Oranges In Juice, drained
8 ounces Crushed Pineapple In Juice, canned
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cake mix, eggs, oil, and pecans in a large bowl until well mixed.
2. Add the drained mandarin oranges and pour into a floured 9 by 13 inch pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Allow the cake to cool completely before frosting.
Frosting:
1. In a medium bowl, mix the crushed pineapple with cornstarch and sugar.
2. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly until thick and clear.
3. Remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
4. Pour the cooled frosting over the cooled cake, spreading evenly.
5. Slice the bananas into thin rounds and place them on top of the frosting layer.
6. In a separate bowl, combine the pudding mix with milk.
7. Fold in the Cool Whip until no lumps remain.
8. Add the coconut flakes and pecans to the pudding mixture.
9. Spread the cooled pudding mixture over the cake, covering it completely.
